docket_entries.description: CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, A CA. LTD. PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, MIKEL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CONFESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, A CA. LTD. PARTNERSHIP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1134 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, A CA. LTD. PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, MIKEL $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $546.00, POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3048 - 16TH ST. #321, S.F. CA. AND FOR THE FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE OR RENTAL AGREEMENT UNDER WHICH SAID DEFENDANT HOLDS SAID PREMISES.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, MIKEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $3.76 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALTAMONT HOTEL ASSOCIATES, A CA. LTD. PARTNERSHIP
